2_BetweenPlotsLevel

Ben J. Rivera

2023-07-12

The goal of this file is look at the the between plot level of our study. As we did in previous files, we begin with measuring each site individually. For the analysis more relevant to the manuscript, scroll to the heading title “Combined Analysis” where we grouped each site together. From there, we created our models and figures.

Ten Mile

Cover

TeMi2_Cover <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(TeMi_Names)) { #for-loop to combine focal and concentric quadrats 
  Temp_Cover<-TeMi_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("TeMi.", TeMi_Names[i])))
  Temp_Concentric<-rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5]/4) #CHECK THIS
  Temp_Cover2<- (Temp_Cover[1]*.25)+(Temp_Concentric*.75) #CHECK THIS
  if(i ==1) {
    TeMi2_Cover<- Temp_Cover2
  } else {
    TeMi2_Cover<-cbind(TeMi2_Cover, Temp_Cover2)
  }
}

mean(colSums(TeMi_Cover, na.rm = TRUE))
## [1] 27.36667
mean(colSums(TeMi2_Cover, na.rm = TRUE)) #I think these numbers lining up means it worked right
## [1] 27.89263
#TeMi2_Cover <- TeMi2_Cover[,colSums(is.na(TeMi2_Cover))<nrow(TeMi2_Cover)]
TeMi2_Cover[is.na(TeMi2_Cover)] <- 0

colSums(TeMi2_Cover) > 100
## TeMi.01f TeMi.02f TeMi.03f TeMi.04f TeMi.05f  TeMi.6f  TeMi.7f  TeMi.8f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
##  TeMi.9f TeMi.10f TeMi.11f TeMi.12f TeMi.13f TeMi.14f TeMi.15f TeMi.16f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## TeMi.17f TeMi.18f TeMi.19f TeMi.20f TeMi.21f TeMi.22f TeMi.23f TeMi.24f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## TeMi.25f TeMi.26f TeMi.28f TeMi.29f TeMi.31f TeMi.32f TeMi.33f TeMi.34f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## TeMi.35f TeMi.36f TeMi.38f TeMi.39f TeMi.40f TeMi.48f TeMi.50f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE
bareground<- vector(mode="double", length=ncol(TeMi2_Cover))
names(bareground) <- "bareground"

for(l in 1:length(TeMi2_Cover)) {
  bareground[l] <- 100-sum(TeMi2_Cover[l])
}
TeMi2_Cover <- rbind(TeMi2_Cover, bareground)

rownames(TeMi2_Cover)[dim(TeMi2_Cover)[1]] <- "bareground"
TeMi2_Dis<-vegdist(t(TeMi2_Cover), na.rm = TRUE, method = "bray") #Calculate Dissim between plots

TeMi2_CoverNMDS<-metaMDS(comm =t(TeMi2_Cover), distance = "bray"  ) #just doing a gross NMDS for visualization
## Square root transformation
## Wisconsin double standardization
## Run 0 stress 0.1832169 
## Run 1 stress 0.1861194 
## Run 2 stress 0.2012074 
## Run 3 stress 0.2047255 
## Run 4 stress 0.1832169 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 2.745043e-05  max resid 0.0001139884 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 5 stress 0.1962183 
## Run 6 stress 0.2108771 
## Run 7 stress 0.1956478 
## Run 8 stress 0.19338 
## Run 9 stress 0.1832171 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.000209713  max resid 0.0008694989 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 10 stress 0.1978787 
## Run 11 stress 0.2106077 
## Run 12 stress 0.1832172 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002286304  max resid 0.0009543007 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 13 stress 0.1978789 
## Run 14 stress 0.2010508 
## Run 15 stress 0.2125002 
## Run 16 stress 0.1847278 
## Run 17 stress 0.1847279 
## Run 18 stress 0.1847277 
## Run 19 stress 0.1844512 
## Run 20 stress 0.1999044 
## *** Best solution repeated 3 times
ordiplot(TeMi2_CoverNMDS, type = "text")

TeMi2<- dist2list(TeMi2_Dis, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(TeMi2$value) 

densityplot(sqrt(TeMi2$value))

I’m not sure if adding in bareground was smart or not

Environmental

TeMi2_Env<-TeMi_Diss[c(1,7:9 , 14:16)]
TeMi2_Env<- data.frame(TeMi2_Env[,-1], row.names=TeMi2_Env[,1])

TeMi2_Env_dissim <- vegdist(TeMi2_Env, method = "gower")
TeMi2_Env_dissim_long<- dist2list(TeMi2_Env_dissim, tri = TRUE)
TeMi2_EnvNMDS<-metaMDS(comm = TeMi2_Env, distance = "gower")
## 'comm' has negative data: 'autotransform', 'noshare' and 'wascores' set to FALSE
## Run 0 stress 0.1539302 
## Run 1 stress 0.1620079 
## Run 2 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 3 stress 0.1539302 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.048944e-05  max resid 4.118512e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 4 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 5 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 6 stress 0.160715 
## Run 7 stress 0.160715 
## Run 8 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 9 stress 0.1878671 
## Run 10 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 11 stress 0.1620078 
## Run 12 stress 0.1546093 
## Run 13 stress 0.1862658 
## Run 14 stress 0.1546092 
## Run 15 stress 0.1539302 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.045898e-05  max resid 5.029739e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 16 stress 0.1539302 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.47738e-05  max resid 5.686411e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 17 stress 0.1539303 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0001194107  max resid 0.0006418205 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 18 stress 0.160715 
## Run 19 stress 0.1901028 
## Run 20 stress 0.160715 
## *** Best solution repeated 4 times
plot(TeMi2_EnvNMDS)
## species scores not available

densityplot(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$value)

densityplot(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$value*.8)

Aspect

Aspect has been such a fun puzzle to solve. Ultimately, I have decided on the two dissimilarity matrices route.

TeMi_Aspect<- data.frame(TeMi_Diss$Aspect, row.names = TeMi_Diss[,1])


for(a in 1:nrow(CircleConverter)){
  TeMi_Aspect$TeMi_Diss.Aspect[which(TeMi_Aspect == CircleConverter$Aspect[a])] <- CircleConverter$Angle[a]

  
}

TeMi_Aspect$TeMi_Diss.Aspect <- as.numeric(TeMi_Aspect$TeMi_Diss.Aspect)
TeMi_Circle<- circular(TeMi_Aspect, units = "degrees", modulo = "2pi", rotation = "clock", template = "geographics")
plot.circular(TeMi_Circle, stack = TRUE)

TeMi_CircleDiss<-dist.circular(TeMi_Circle, method = "geodesic")/pi #well this actually make the most sense
TeMi_CircleDissLong<- dist2list(TeMi_CircleDiss, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(TeMi_CircleDissLong$value)

summary(TeMi_CircleDissLong$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##   0.000   0.250   0.500   0.498   0.750   1.000

Env Combined

which(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$col != TeMi_CircleDissLong$col)
## integer(0)
which(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$row != TeMi_CircleDissLong$row)
## integer(0)
TeMi2$EnvDis<-(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$value * 0.8) + (TeMi_CircleDissLong$value * 0.2)
which(TeMi2_Env_dissim_long$value == TeMi2$EnvDis)
## integer(0)
densityplot(TeMi2$EnvDis)

summary(TeMi2$EnvDis)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.05535 0.24427 0.31359 0.32087 0.39079 0.69865
summary(TeMi2$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.00375 0.16875 0.27125 0.30393 0.40563 0.92937
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = value), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = sqrt(value)), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(value ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = value ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.30311 -0.13257 -0.02744  0.10365  0.62849 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.26620    0.02119  12.562   <2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.11758    0.06272   1.875   0.0612 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1806 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.004733,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.003386 
## F-statistic: 3.514 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.06123
summary(lm(sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.46813 -0.11396 -0.00361  0.11119  0.43915 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.49892    0.01891  26.378   <2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.08806    0.05598   1.573    0.116    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1612 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.003337,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.001988 
## F-statistic: 2.474 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.1161

Actual Distances

TeMi_difvalues<-setdiff(TeMi_RelCords$Plot, as.character(TeMi_Diss$Plot))



`%not_in%` <- purrr::negate(`%in%`)
TeMi2_RelCord<-TeMi_RelCords[TeMi_RelCords$Plot %not_in% TeMi_difvalues,]


TeMi2_RelCord <- data.frame(TeMi2_RelCord[,-1], row.names=TeMi2_RelCord[,1])
TeMi2_RelCord
##            X          Y          Z
## 1  27.990537  15.291673 0.09103439
## 2  34.037617   7.180370 0.00000000
## 3  46.899693   6.040091 3.30817681
## 4  53.331199  14.105131 4.49339646
## 5  44.406495  30.406395 4.34845167
## 6  35.088731  20.957058 4.65637884
## 7  40.485576  40.637380 3.64068300
## 8  36.284753  47.594712 3.31265431
## 9  44.538610  54.693676 3.88600077
## 10 42.258016  62.059409 3.73437330
## 11 45.175724  69.424034 3.65953427
## 12 50.352817  70.845848 3.37780631
## 13 56.677970  65.907891 3.34443095
## 14 65.971008  60.652649 2.79918644
## 15 50.710769  50.123907 4.23089122
## 16 52.833874  45.833341 4.24961588
## 17 71.548510  53.076142 2.74682283
## 18 68.519415   4.167491 3.97374474
## 19 64.287094  74.343952 3.17700019
## 20 69.778824  82.968635 2.99797455
## 21 75.123102 141.071323 2.92300652
## 22 66.484601 134.444392 2.34104431
## 23 58.053260 131.503395 1.42999922
## 24 53.126662 132.385250 1.89434824
## 25 61.372011 141.405202 1.86092059
## 26 48.368102 148.377163 1.95874359
## 28 34.655811 143.566687 2.15010223
## 29 53.532873 113.584109 2.63963189
## 31 50.538701  98.339499 3.79939469
## 33 42.690499  87.942088 4.94508211
## 32 47.613582  90.241719 3.41512400
## 34 26.698273  86.455169 3.24247920
## 35 38.364895  92.154764 4.12779540
## 36 24.728084 101.430741 4.54671106
## 38 13.122583 104.801426 3.40057820
## 39 12.680135 114.290108 3.49171003
## 40 24.604228 121.241563 3.58931271
## 48  2.783238  28.691601 2.69535328
## 50  8.272297  14.292430 3.17253694
TeMi2_X<-designdist(TeMi2_RelCord[1], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")

TeMi2_Y<-designdist(TeMi2_RelCord[2], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")
TeMi2_Z<-designdist(TeMi2_RelCord[3], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")


TeMi2_Dist<-data.frame(dist2list(TeMi2_X, tri = TRUE)[1:2],Xdist = dist2list(TeMi2_X, tri = TRUE)$value, Ydist = dist2list(TeMi2_Y, tri = TRUE)$value, Zdist = dist2list(TeMi2_Z, tri = TRUE)$value)

TeMi2_Dist$TotalDist<-sqrt(TeMi2_Dist$Xdist^2 + TeMi2_Dist$Ydis^2 + TeMi2_Dist$Zdist^2)


densityplot(TeMi2_Dist$Xdist)

densityplot(TeMi2_Dist$Ydist)

densityplot(TeMi2_Dist$Zdist)

densityplot(TeMi2_Dist$TotalDist)

TeMi2<-data.frame(TeMi2_Dist[1:2], Dissim = TeMi2$value, TeMi2[4], TeMi2_Dist[3:6])

Plots and models

TeMi_EnvDis.mod <-lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
summary(TeMi_EnvDis.mod) # .
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.30311 -0.13257 -0.02744  0.10365  0.62849 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.26620    0.02119  12.562   <2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.11758    0.06272   1.875   0.0612 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1806 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.004733,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.003386 
## F-statistic: 3.514 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.06123
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = EnvDis ), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Environmental Similarity between Points")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = TeMi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.29312 -0.13543 -0.03447  0.10577  0.62565 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.3108401  0.0111946  27.767   <2e-16 ***
## abs(Xdist)  -0.0003401  0.0004430  -0.768    0.443    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.181 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0007969,  Adjusted R-squared:  -0.0005552 
## F-statistic: 0.5894 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.4429
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Xdist) ), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = TeMi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.30004 -0.13271 -0.03256  0.10208  0.63504 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.3182595  0.0117480  27.090   <2e-16 ***
## abs(Ydist)  -0.0002780  0.0001879  -1.479     0.14    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1808 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.002952,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.001603 
## F-statistic: 2.188 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.1395
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Ydist) ), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissim ~ sqrt(abs(Zdist)), data = TeMi2)) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ sqrt(abs(Zdist)), data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.29760 -0.13248 -0.03740  0.09972  0.66004 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)       0.34474    0.01617  21.318  < 2e-16 ***
## sqrt(abs(Zdist)) -0.04081    0.01475  -2.766  0.00581 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1801 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01025,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.008909 
## F-statistic: 7.652 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.005813
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = sqrt(abs(Zdist)) ), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

TeMi_TotalDist.mod<- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = TeMi2)
summary(TeMi_TotalDist.mod) # .
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.30491 -0.13308 -0.03598  0.10142  0.63615 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.3250840  0.0135683  23.959   <2e-16 ***
## TotalDist   -0.0003597  0.0002012  -1.788   0.0742 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1807 on 739 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.004307,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.00296 
## F-statistic: 3.197 on 1 and 739 DF,  p-value: 0.0742
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = TotalDist ), data = TeMi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Distance between Points")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

anova(TeMi_EnvDis.mod, TeMi_TotalDist.mod, test = "Chisq")
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissim ~ EnvDis
## Model 2: Dissim ~ TotalDist
##   Res.Df    RSS Df Sum of Sq Pr(>Chi)
## 1    739 24.117                      
## 2    739 24.127  0  -0.01033
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis+TotalDist, data = TeMi2)) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.31519 -0.13218 -0.02944  0.10513  0.63869 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.2861628  0.0235087  12.173   <2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.1271733  0.0627937   2.025   0.0432 *  
## TotalDist   -0.0003917  0.0002014  -1.945   0.0521 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1803 on 738 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.00981,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.007127 
## F-statistic: 3.656 on 2 and 738 DF,  p-value: 0.02631
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis*TotalDist, data = TeMi2)) # .
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis * TotalDist, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.31783 -0.13360 -0.02776  0.10486  0.63815 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                    Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)       0.2732682  0.0411949   6.634 6.34e-11 ***
## EnvDis            0.1684370  0.1251388   1.346    0.179    
## TotalDist        -0.0001751  0.0006029  -0.290    0.772    
## EnvDis:TotalDist -0.0006836  0.0017929  -0.381    0.703    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1804 on 737 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01001,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.005976 
## F-statistic: 2.483 on 3 and 737 DF,  p-value: 0.05975

Marginal Effects

TeMi_Combined.mod <- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist+EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
summary(TeMi_Combined.mod)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist + EnvDis, data = TeMi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.31519 -0.13218 -0.02944  0.10513  0.63869 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.2861628  0.0235087  12.173   <2e-16 ***
## TotalDist   -0.0003917  0.0002014  -1.945   0.0521 .  
## EnvDis       0.1271733  0.0627937   2.025   0.0432 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1803 on 738 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.00981,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.007127 
## F-statistic: 3.656 on 2 and 738 DF,  p-value: 0.02631
TeMi.pre<-predictions(TeMi_Combined.mod)
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = estimate), data = TeMi.pre)+
  geom_point()

TeMi.cmp<- avg_comparisons(TeMi_Combined.mod,  variables =  list(TotalDist = "minmax", EnvDis = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")

TeMi.cmp
## 
##       Term Estimate Std. Error     z Pr(>|z|)   S   5.0 %   95.0 %
##  EnvDis      0.0818     0.0404  2.03   0.0428 4.5  0.0154  0.14826
##  TotalDist  -0.0552     0.0284 -1.95   0.0517 4.3 -0.1018 -0.00852
## 
## Type: response
## Comparison: Max - Min
ggplot(TeMi.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", size = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(title = "Ten Mile")
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: Using the `size` aesthetic with geom_path was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` aesthetic instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

plot_comparisons(TeMi_Combined.mod,
                 variables = "EnvDis",
                 condition = "TotalDist",
                 comparison = "ratio")

Zmudowski

Cover

Zmud2_Cover <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(Zmud_Names)) { #for-loop to combine focal and concentric quadrats 
  Temp_Cover<-Zmud_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("Zmud.", Zmud_Names[i])))
  Temp_Concentric<-rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5]/4) #CHECK THIS
  Temp_Cover2<- (Temp_Cover[1]*.25)+(Temp_Concentric*.75) #CHECK THIS
  if(i ==1) {
    Zmud2_Cover<- Temp_Cover2
  } else {
    Zmud2_Cover<-cbind(Zmud2_Cover, Temp_Cover2)
  }
}

mean(colSums(Zmud_Cover, na.rm = TRUE))
## [1] 43.7093
mean(colSums(Zmud2_Cover, na.rm = TRUE)) #I think these numbers lining up means it worked right
## [1] 44.02108
#Zmud2_Cover <- Zmud2_Cover[,colSums(is.na(Zmud2_Cover))<nrow(Zmud2_Cover)]
Zmud2_Cover[is.na(Zmud2_Cover)] <- 0

colSums(Zmud2_Cover) > 100
## Zmud.01f Zmud.02f Zmud.03f Zmud.04f  Zmud.5f  Zmud.6f  Zmud.7f  Zmud.8f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
##  Zmud.9f Zmud.10f Zmud.11f Zmud.12f Zmud.13f Zmud.14f Zmud.15f Zmud.16f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## Zmud.18f Zmud.19f Zmud.20f Zmud.21f Zmud.22f Zmud.23f Zmud.24f Zmud.25f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## Zmud.26f Zmud.27f Zmud.28f Zmud.29f Zmud.30f Zmud.31f Zmud.32f Zmud.33f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## Zmud.34f Zmud.35f Zmud.36f Zmud.37f Zmud.38f Zmud.39f Zmud.40f Zmud.41f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## Zmud.42f Zmud.43f Zmud.44f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE
bareground<- vector(mode="double", length=ncol(Zmud2_Cover))
names(bareground) <- "bareground"

for(l in 1:length(Zmud2_Cover)) {
  bareground[l] <- 100-sum(Zmud2_Cover[l])
}
Zmud2_Cover <- rbind(Zmud2_Cover, bareground)

rownames(Zmud2_Cover)[dim(Zmud2_Cover)[1]] <- "bareground"
Zmud2_Dis<-vegdist(t(Zmud2_Cover), na.rm = TRUE, method = "bray") #Calculate Dissim between plots

Zmud2_CoverNMDS<-metaMDS(comm =t(Zmud2_Cover), distance = "bray"  ) #just doing a gross NMDS for visualization
## Square root transformation
## Wisconsin double standardization
## Run 0 stress 0.2129444 
## Run 1 stress 0.219806 
## Run 2 stress 0.219853 
## Run 3 stress 0.211476 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.03488761  max resid 0.2045043 
## Run 4 stress 0.2123757 
## Run 5 stress 0.2138169 
## Run 6 stress 0.213818 
## Run 7 stress 0.2208846 
## Run 8 stress 0.212384 
## Run 9 stress 0.2116149 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.005716734  max resid 0.02711899 
## Run 10 stress 0.2137676 
## Run 11 stress 0.2123758 
## Run 12 stress 0.2208846 
## Run 13 stress 0.2660025 
## Run 14 stress 0.2197094 
## Run 15 stress 0.212384 
## Run 16 stress 0.2183764 
## Run 17 stress 0.2185346 
## Run 18 stress 0.211476 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 9.516978e-05  max resid 0.0005414075 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 19 stress 0.218622 
## Run 20 stress 0.2202726 
## *** Best solution repeated 1 times
ordiplot(Zmud2_CoverNMDS, type = "text")

Zmud2<- dist2list(Zmud2_Dis, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(Zmud2$value) 

densityplot(sqrt(Zmud2$value))

I’m not sure if adding in bareground was smart or not

Environmental

Zmud2_Env<-Zmud_Diss[c(1,7:9 )]
Zmud2_Env<- data.frame(Zmud2_Env[,-1], row.names=Zmud2_Env[,1])

Zmud2_Env_dissim <- vegdist(Zmud2_Env, method = "gower")
Zmud2_Env_dissim_long<- dist2list(Zmud2_Env_dissim, tri = TRUE)
Zmud2_EnvNMDS<-metaMDS(comm = Zmud2_Env, distance = "gower")
## 'comm' has negative data: 'autotransform', 'noshare' and 'wascores' set to FALSE
## Run 0 stress 0.1119325 
## Run 1 stress 0.1119325 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.000568483  max resid 0.003170165 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 2 stress 0.1119322 
## ... New best solution

## ... Similar to previous best

## ... Similar to previous best

## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0003496414  max resid 0.001949221 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 6 stress 0.1119326 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0001954687  max resid 0.001091418 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 7 stress 0.1119322 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.000251827  max resid 0.001403769 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 8 stress 0.1119326 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0001991317  max resid 0.001110834 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 9 stress 0.1119322 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002135295  max resid 0.00118948 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 10 stress 0.1119326 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.000237608  max resid 0.00132537 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 11 stress 0.1119322 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.222209e-05  max resid 5.141399e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best

## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0001407498  max resid 0.000780983 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 13 stress 0.1119322 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.514994e-05  max resid 7.56654e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 14 stress 0.1119322 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 4.077272e-05  max resid 0.0002073812 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 15 stress 0.188566 
## Run 16 stress 0.1873789 
## Run 17 stress 0.1119326 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002244792  max resid 0.001242993 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 18 stress 0.1119322 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002103388  max resid 0.00118082 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 19 stress 0.1119325 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0003594979  max resid 0.002008424 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 20 stress 0.1119327 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0001736903  max resid 0.0009326625 
## ... Similar to previous best
## *** Best solution repeated 6 times
plot(Zmud2_EnvNMDS)
## species scores not available

densityplot(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$value)

densityplot(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$value*.8)

Aspect

Aspect has been such a fun puzzle to solve. Ultimately, I have decided on the two dissimilarity matrices route.

Zmud_Aspect<- data.frame(Zmud_Diss$Aspect, row.names = Zmud_Diss[,1])


for(a in 1:nrow(CircleConverter)){
  Zmud_Aspect$Zmud_Diss.Aspect[which(Zmud_Aspect == CircleConverter$Aspect[a])] <- CircleConverter$Angle[a]

  
}

Zmud_Aspect$Zmud_Diss.Aspect <- as.numeric(Zmud_Aspect$Zmud_Diss.Aspect)
Zmud_Circle<- circular(Zmud_Aspect, units = "degrees", modulo = "2pi")
plot.circular(Zmud_Circle, stack = TRUE)

Zmud_CircleDiss<-dist.circular(Zmud_Circle, method = "geodesic")/pi #well this actually make the most sense
Zmud_CircleDissLong<- dist2list(Zmud_CircleDiss, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(Zmud_CircleDissLong$value)

summary(Zmud_CircleDissLong$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.0000  0.2500  0.5000  0.4834  0.7500  1.0000

Env Combined

which(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$col != Zmud_CircleDissLong$col)
## integer(0)
which(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$row != Zmud_CircleDissLong$row)
## integer(0)
Zmud2$EnvDis<-(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$value * 0.8) + (Zmud_CircleDissLong$value * 0.2)
which(Zmud2_Env_dissim_long$value == Zmud2$EnvDis)
## integer(0)
densityplot(Zmud2$EnvDis)

summary(Zmud2$EnvDis)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.02838 0.22087 0.29528 0.30428 0.36920 0.75857
summary(Zmud2$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.02125 0.26906 0.45969 0.45402 0.62156 0.96688
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = value), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = sqrt(value)), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(value ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = value ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44958 -0.18112  0.00936  0.16273  0.52668 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.35932    0.01817  19.773  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.31123    0.05519   5.639 2.29e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2086 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.03409,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.03301 
## F-statistic:  31.8 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 2.291e-08
summary(lm(sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.4747 -0.1325  0.0283  0.1296  0.3463 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.58112    0.01446  40.183  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.23434    0.04392   5.335 1.21e-07 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.166 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.03062,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02955 
## F-statistic: 28.46 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 1.209e-07

Actual Distances

Zmud_difvalues<-setdiff(Zmud_RelCords$Plot, as.character(Zmud_Diss$Plot))



`%not_in%` <- purrr::negate(`%in%`)
Zmud2_RelCord<-Zmud_RelCords[Zmud_RelCords$Plot %not_in% Zmud_difvalues,]


Zmud2_RelCord <- data.frame(Zmud2_RelCord[,-1], row.names=Zmud2_RelCord[,1])
Zmud2_RelCord
##            X          Y         Z
## 1   1.593281  28.785325 0.1488441
## 6   2.142254  44.437767 0.5657641
## 2   8.375949  18.387957 1.2691597
## 3  14.858046   8.315248 1.6631635
## 4  19.668269  28.475279 4.3626350
## 5  26.384606  35.374875 4.5155471
## 7  23.557017  51.493103 4.6181055
## 8  24.293061  61.897836 5.1652578
## 9  42.073136  64.132070 5.1855985
## 15 58.602835  22.431651 3.2855964
## 10 43.472992  22.708879 6.2835489
## 11 33.315277  14.044286 5.7441426
## 12 37.839019   7.661235 5.2922461
## 13 53.116278   9.658651 3.6163549
## 14 54.840295  15.973590 3.9427689
## 16 68.751869   7.317895 4.2894021
## 18 74.262600  52.668079 2.7215093
## 19 58.810935  58.646950 2.3102083
## 20 71.624071  67.076587 2.5322010
## 22 79.335833  78.662278 1.6487158
## 21 54.188614  77.911262 2.2540398
## 29 40.006575  83.645622 3.6665176
## 30 35.059871 104.559392 5.1544455
## 26 64.856294 101.612095 2.6585019
## 27 61.120191 105.979192 2.5273078
## 28 51.709076 107.023722 2.5152239
## 25 64.123316 138.967351 1.7078583
## 23 79.047999 146.954680 0.6210996
## 24 61.935135 155.209626 2.4432179
## 31 22.913242 113.636707 7.0920777
## 32 18.665245 125.448531 5.9756539
## 33 27.850702 132.585554 5.8673716
## 34 35.730120 128.063646 2.2363595
## 35 46.381406 125.516720 0.9136809
## 36 42.073818 133.274352 1.0842619
## 37 46.066531 142.838759 2.9224525
## 38 37.862700 159.717777 1.1421085
## 39 15.842293 147.681712 5.6341880
## 40 28.423862 143.455065 5.2593450
## 42  4.531761 113.105124 2.5459554
## 43 -2.992133 120.190427 0.0000000
## 41  9.399403 159.789324 3.9213988
## 44 13.231470 119.841101 5.2529837
Zmud2_X<-designdist(Zmud2_RelCord[1], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")

Zmud2_Y<-designdist(Zmud2_RelCord[2], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")
Zmud2_Z<-designdist(Zmud2_RelCord[3], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")


Zmud2_Dist<-data.frame(dist2list(Zmud2_X, tri = TRUE)[1:2],Xdist = dist2list(Zmud2_X, tri = TRUE)$value, Ydist = dist2list(Zmud2_Y, tri = TRUE)$value, Zdist = dist2list(Zmud2_Z, tri = TRUE)$value)

Zmud2_Dist$TotalDist<-sqrt(Zmud2_Dist$Xdist^2 + Zmud2_Dist$Ydis^2 + Zmud2_Dist$Zdist^2)


densityplot(Zmud2_Dist$Xdist)

densityplot(Zmud2_Dist$Ydist)

densityplot(Zmud2_Dist$Zdist)

densityplot(Zmud2_Dist$TotalDist)

Zmud2<-data.frame(Zmud2_Dist[1:2], Dissim = Zmud2$value, Zmud2[4], Zmud2_Dist[3:6])

Plots and models

Zmud_EnvDis.mod <-lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
summary(Zmud_EnvDis.mod) # ***
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44958 -0.18112  0.00936  0.16273  0.52668 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.35932    0.01817  19.773  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.31123    0.05519   5.639 2.29e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2086 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.03409,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.03301 
## F-statistic:  31.8 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 2.291e-08
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = EnvDis ), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Environmental Similarity between Points")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = Zmud2)) #***
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42023 -0.18106 -0.00102  0.16992  0.54420 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.4145464  0.0123515   33.56  < 2e-16 ***
## abs(Xdist)  0.0014890  0.0003838    3.88 0.000112 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2105 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01644,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01534 
## F-statistic: 15.06 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 0.000112
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Xdist) ), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = Zmud2)) #**
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.46771 -0.18144  0.01187  0.16841  0.53354 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.4223839  0.0122793  34.398  < 2e-16 ***
## abs(Ydist)  0.0005351  0.0001703   3.141  0.00174 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2111 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01083,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.009734 
## F-statistic: 9.867 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 0.001738
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Ydist) ), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ (abs(Zdist)), data = Zmud2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ (abs(Zdist)), data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.4242 -0.1874  0.0070  0.1644  0.5187 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.442182   0.012343  35.824   <2e-16 ***
## abs(Zdist)  0.005456   0.004667   1.169    0.243    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2121 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.001515,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.0004065 
## F-statistic: 1.367 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 0.2427
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = sqrt(abs(Zdist)) ), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()

Zmud_TotalDist.mod<- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = Zmud2)
summary(Zmud_TotalDist.mod) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.47752 -0.17660  0.00816  0.17075  0.54907 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3982428  0.0148433   26.83  < 2e-16 ***
## TotalDist   0.0008006  0.0001879    4.26 2.26e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2101 on 901 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01975,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01866 
## F-statistic: 18.15 on 1 and 901 DF,  p-value: 2.258e-05
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = TotalDist ), data = Zmud2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Distance between Points")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

anova(Zmud_EnvDis.mod, Zmud_TotalDist.mod, test = "Chisq")
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissim ~ EnvDis
## Model 2: Dissim ~ TotalDist
##   Res.Df    RSS Df Sum of Sq Pr(>Chi)
## 1    901 39.198                      
## 2    901 39.780  0  -0.58201
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis+TotalDist, data = Zmud2)) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44301 -0.17181  0.01208  0.16511  0.53272 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3248481  0.0207399  15.663  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis      0.2785525  0.0557187   4.999 6.92e-07 ***
## TotalDist   0.0006375  0.0001883   3.385 0.000742 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2074 on 900 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.04623,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.04411 
## F-statistic: 21.81 on 2 and 900 DF,  p-value: 5.616e-10
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis*TotalDist, data = Zmud2)) # .
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis * TotalDist, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44133 -0.17162  0.01159  0.16534  0.53292 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                    Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)       0.3197547  0.0371699   8.603  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis            0.2950097  0.1141756   2.584  0.00993 ** 
## TotalDist         0.0007166  0.0005150   1.391  0.16444    
## EnvDis:TotalDist -0.0002467  0.0014937  -0.165  0.86885    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2075 on 899 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.04626,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.04308 
## F-statistic: 14.53 on 3 and 899 DF,  p-value: 2.987e-09

Marginal Effects

Zmud_Combined.mod <- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist+EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
summary(Zmud_Combined.mod)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist + EnvDis, data = Zmud2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44301 -0.17181  0.01208  0.16511  0.53272 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3248481  0.0207399  15.663  < 2e-16 ***
## TotalDist   0.0006375  0.0001883   3.385 0.000742 ***
## EnvDis      0.2785525  0.0557187   4.999 6.92e-07 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2074 on 900 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.04623,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.04411 
## F-statistic: 21.81 on 2 and 900 DF,  p-value: 5.616e-10
Zmud.pre<-predictions(Zmud_Combined.mod)
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = estimate), data = Zmud.pre)+
  geom_point()

Zmud.cmp<- avg_comparisons(Zmud_Combined.mod,  variables =  list(TotalDist = "minmax", EnvDis = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")

Zmud.cmp
## 
##       Term Estimate Std. Error    z Pr(>|z|)    S  5.0 % 95.0 %
##  EnvDis       0.203     0.0407 5.00   <0.001 20.7 0.1365   0.27
##  TotalDist    0.101     0.0297 3.39   <0.001 10.5 0.0517   0.15
## 
## Type: response
## Comparison: Max - Min
ggplot(Zmud.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", size = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(title = "Zmudowski")

plot_comparisons(Zmud_Combined.mod,
                 variables = "EnvDis",
                 condition = "TotalDist",
                 comparison = "ratio")

Guadalupe-Nipomo

Cover

GuNi2_Cover <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(GuNi_Names)) { #for-loop to combine focal and concentric quadrats 
  Temp_Cover<-GuNi_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("GuNi.", GuNi_Names[i])))
  Temp_Concentric<-rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5]/4) #CHECK THIS
  Temp_Cover2<- (Temp_Cover[1]*.25)+(Temp_Concentric*.75) #CHECK THIS
  if(i ==1) {
    GuNi2_Cover<- Temp_Cover2
  } else {
    GuNi2_Cover<-cbind(GuNi2_Cover, Temp_Cover2)
  }
}

mean(colSums(GuNi_Cover, na.rm = TRUE))
## [1] 22.515
mean(colSums(GuNi2_Cover, na.rm = TRUE)) #I think these numbers lining up means it worked right
## [1] 22.725
#GuNi2_Cover <- GuNi2_Cover[,colSums(is.na(GuNi2_Cover))<nrow(GuNi2_Cover)]
GuNi2_Cover[is.na(GuNi2_Cover)] <- 0

colSums(GuNi2_Cover) > 100
## GuNi.01f GuNi.02f GuNi.03f GuNi.04f  GuNi.5f  GuNi.6f  GuNi.7f  GuNi.8f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
##  GuNi.9f GuNi.10f GuNi.11f GuNi.12f GuNi.13f GuNi.14f GuNi.15f GuNi.16f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## GuNi.17f GuNi.18f GuNi.19f GuNi.20f GuNi.21f GuNi.22f GuNi.23f GuNi.24f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## GuNi.25f GuNi.26f GuNi.27f GuNi.28f GuNi.29f GuNi.30f GuNi.31f GuNi.32f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE 
## GuNi.33f GuNi.34f GuNi.35f GuNi.36f GuNi.37f GuNi.38f GuNi.39f GuNi.40f 
##    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE    FALSE
bareground<- vector(mode="double", length=ncol(GuNi2_Cover))
names(bareground) <- "bareground"

for(l in 1:length(GuNi2_Cover)) {
  bareground[l] <- 100-sum(GuNi2_Cover[l])
}
GuNi2_Cover <- rbind(GuNi2_Cover, bareground)

rownames(GuNi2_Cover)[dim(GuNi2_Cover)[1]] <- "bareground"
GuNi2_Dis<-vegdist(t(GuNi2_Cover), na.rm = TRUE, method = "bray") #Calculate Dissim between plots

GuNi2_CoverNMDS<-metaMDS(comm =t(GuNi2_Cover), distance = "bray"  ) #just doing a gross NMDS for visualization
## Square root transformation
## Wisconsin double standardization
## Run 0 stress 0.131931 
## Run 1 stress 0.1587733 
## Run 2 stress 0.1367705 
## Run 3 stress 0.131931 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 2.49276e-05  max resid 0.0001391251 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 4 stress 0.1535151 
## Run 5 stress 0.140205 
## Run 6 stress 0.13677 
## Run 7 stress 0.1412092 
## Run 8 stress 0.14074 
## Run 9 stress 0.1367701 
## Run 10 stress 0.1319311 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 7.074452e-05  max resid 0.0003978587 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 11 stress 0.1587733 
## Run 12 stress 0.1362107 
## Run 13 stress 0.1524619 
## Run 14 stress 0.1596938 
## Run 15 stress 0.3833295 
## Run 16 stress 0.1402056 
## Run 17 stress 0.1379821 
## Run 18 stress 0.1380774 
## Run 19 stress 0.1451815 
## Run 20 stress 0.1367698 
## *** Best solution repeated 2 times
ordiplot(GuNi2_CoverNMDS, type = "text")

GuNi2<- dist2list(GuNi2_Dis, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(GuNi2$value) 

densityplot(sqrt(GuNi2$value))

I’m not sure if adding in bareground was smart or not

Environmental

GuNi2_Env<-GuNi_Diss[c(1,7:9 , 14:16)]
GuNi2_Env<- data.frame(GuNi2_Env[,-1], row.names=GuNi2_Env[,1])

GuNi2_Env_dissim <- vegdist(GuNi2_Env, method = "gower", na.rm = TRUE)
GuNi2_Env_dissim_long<- dist2list(GuNi2_Env_dissim, tri = TRUE)
GuNi2_EnvNMDS<-metaMDS(comm = GuNi2_Env, distance = "gower", na.rm = TRUE)
## 'comm' has negative data: 'autotransform', 'noshare' and 'wascores' set to FALSE
## Run 0 stress 0.1609095 
## Run 1 stress 0.1609093 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002485559  max resid 0.001225448 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 2 stress 0.1706042 
## Run 3 stress 0.1948974 
## Run 4 stress 0.1609093 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 3.227002e-05  max resid 0.0001604864 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 5 stress 0.1609096 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002891528  max resid 0.001444416 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 6 stress 0.1609097 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0003334187  max resid 0.001645689 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 7 stress 0.1706042 
## Run 8 stress 0.1609093 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 1.528886e-05  max resid 3.386214e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 9 stress 0.1609093 
## ... New best solution
## ... Procrustes: rmse 6.57222e-06  max resid 2.167299e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 10 stress 0.1706042 
## Run 11 stress 0.1609098 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0004126795  max resid 0.00205489 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 12 stress 0.1977403 
## Run 13 stress 0.1609094 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 3.803425e-05  max resid 0.0001881207 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 14 stress 0.1609095 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 0.0002394456  max resid 0.001193383 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 15 stress 0.1609093 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 2.257919e-05  max resid 0.0001137541 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 16 stress 0.1609093 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 3.981156e-06  max resid 1.709389e-05 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 17 stress 0.1706042 
## Run 18 stress 0.197942 
## Run 19 stress 0.1609094 
## ... Procrustes: rmse 3.13403e-05  max resid 0.0001385773 
## ... Similar to previous best
## Run 20 stress 0.1782454 
## *** Best solution repeated 7 times
plot(GuNi2_EnvNMDS)
## species scores not available

densityplot(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$value)

densityplot(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$value*.8)

Aspect

Aspect has been such a fun puzzle to solve. Ultimately, I have decided on the two dissimilarity matrices route.

GuNi_Aspect<- data.frame(GuNi_Diss$Aspect, row.names = GuNi_Diss[,1])


for(a in 1:nrow(CircleConverter)){
  GuNi_Aspect$GuNi_Diss.Aspect[which(GuNi_Aspect == CircleConverter$Aspect[a])] <- CircleConverter$Angle[a]

  
}

GuNi_Aspect$GuNi_Diss.Aspect <- as.numeric(GuNi_Aspect$GuNi_Diss.Aspect)
GuNi_Circle<- circular(GuNi_Aspect, units = "degrees", modulo = "2pi")
plot.circular(GuNi_Circle, stack = TRUE)

GuNi_CircleDiss<-dist.circular(GuNi_Circle, method = "geodesic")/pi #well this actually make the most sense
GuNi_CircleDissLong<- dist2list(GuNi_CircleDiss, tri = TRUE)
densityplot(GuNi_CircleDissLong$value)

summary(GuNi_CircleDissLong$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.0000  0.2500  0.5000  0.4843  0.7500  1.0000

Env Combined

which(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$col != GuNi_CircleDissLong$col)
## integer(0)
which(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$row != GuNi_CircleDissLong$row)
## integer(0)
GuNi2$EnvDis<-(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$value * 0.8) + (GuNi_CircleDissLong$value * 0.2)
which(GuNi2_Env_dissim_long$value == GuNi2$EnvDis)
## integer(0)
densityplot(GuNi2$EnvDis)

summary(GuNi2$EnvDis)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.02285 0.24049 0.31007 0.31594 0.39120 0.68332
summary(GuNi2$value)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.0000  0.1200  0.2841  0.3282  0.4863  0.8984
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = value), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = sqrt(value)), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(value ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = value ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.41535 -0.19351 -0.04739  0.16236  0.61313 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.22214    0.02542   8.740  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.33580    0.07622   4.406  1.2e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2271 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02434,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02309 
## F-statistic: 19.41 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 1.202e-05
summary(lm(sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = sqrt(value) ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.61552 -0.16187  0.00529  0.17759  0.46858 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.41309    0.02555  16.168  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.35182    0.07662   4.592 5.13e-06 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2283 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02639,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02513 
## F-statistic: 21.08 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 5.125e-06

Actual Distances

GuNi_difvalues<-setdiff(GuNi_RelCords$Plot, as.character(GuNi_Diss$Plot))



`%not_in%` <- purrr::negate(`%in%`)
GuNi2_RelCord<-GuNi_RelCords[GuNi_RelCords$Plot %not_in% GuNi_difvalues,]


GuNi2_RelCord <- data.frame(GuNi2_RelCord[,-1], row.names=GuNi2_RelCord[,1])
GuNi2_RelCord
##            X          Y          Z
## 1  16.388841   7.050741 4.38388198
## 2  18.774903  21.711197 3.18639264
## 7  23.506998  27.572950 1.98687149
## 3  29.543887   1.257654 1.82576805
## 17 81.514674   1.578282 4.65445807
## 18 82.691345  14.360985 4.38120831
## 4  55.573732  19.489113 5.11928491
## 5  60.300354  34.749292 4.58634295
## 6  40.911354  31.869746 3.04942652
## 8  29.437202  41.787560 2.27177838
## 9  36.614357  41.487639 3.50894398
## 10 45.009344  37.604015 4.06952335
## 16 79.991360  35.632810 4.73724101
## 11 52.981347  52.252080 5.53219888
## 12 47.710029  60.119248 2.73125259
## 13 49.854393  69.962471 2.24172302
## 14 69.423492  61.120196 3.35352700
## 15 71.038118  55.995707 3.43694219
## 19 81.664726  64.454631 7.16659752
## 31 27.055239  95.278510 4.04807785
## 32 27.475892  98.541711 2.68268292
## 33 12.417861 104.930248 0.06826653
## 34  3.599231 109.987488 0.00000000
## 35  8.925099 119.321002 0.91434831
## 36 21.621621 113.021786 4.26045703
## 30 58.433029 100.227435 3.05305465
## 29 71.736817 122.737610 4.75541686
## 28 78.022526 122.140128 5.84913603
## 27 80.697975 128.159003 1.94642944
## 21 80.837219 138.410652 6.46527328
## 20 82.919531 147.748881 6.75008149
## 22 46.509919 160.343395 6.18578845
## 23 34.784566 156.595653 4.47040855
## 24 32.409299 151.502210 5.67229701
## 38 27.974647 143.455192 4.68331812
## 37 23.491186 140.990013 4.07797488
## 39 15.994358 152.401172 3.40271579
## 40 10.577495 136.011285 2.04415462
## 25 39.148369 125.772867 3.48577487
## 26 48.220852 121.419430 2.95792532
GuNi2_X<-designdist(GuNi2_RelCord[1], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")

GuNi2_Y<-designdist(GuNi2_RelCord[2], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")
GuNi2_Z<-designdist(GuNi2_RelCord[3], method = "A-B", terms = "minimum")


GuNi2_Dist<-data.frame(dist2list(GuNi2_X, tri = TRUE)[1:2],Xdist = dist2list(GuNi2_X, tri = TRUE)$value, Ydist = dist2list(GuNi2_Y, tri = TRUE)$value, Zdist = dist2list(GuNi2_Z, tri = TRUE)$value)

GuNi2_Dist$TotalDist<-sqrt(GuNi2_Dist$Xdist^2 + GuNi2_Dist$Ydis^2 + GuNi2_Dist$Zdist^2)


densityplot(GuNi2_Dist$Xdist)

densityplot(GuNi2_Dist$Ydist)

densityplot(GuNi2_Dist$Zdist)

densityplot(GuNi2_Dist$TotalDist)

GuNi2<-data.frame(GuNi2_Dist[1:2], Dissim = GuNi2$value, GuNi2[4], GuNi2_Dist[3:6])

Plots and models

GuNi_EnvDis.mod <-lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
summary(GuNi_EnvDis.mod) # ***
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.41535 -0.19351 -0.04739  0.16236  0.61313 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.22214    0.02542   8.740  < 2e-16 ***
## EnvDis       0.33580    0.07622   4.406  1.2e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2271 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02434,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02309 
## F-statistic: 19.41 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 1.202e-05
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = EnvDis ), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Environmental Similarity between Points")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = GuNi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Xdist), data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.37196 -0.19067 -0.03245  0.16719  0.59188 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.2841775  0.0142497  19.943  < 2e-16 ***
## abs(Xdist)  0.0015350  0.0004071   3.771 0.000175 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2279 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01795,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01669 
## F-statistic: 14.22 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 0.000175
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Xdist) ), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = GuNi2))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ abs(Ydist), data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.33045 -0.20694 -0.04366  0.15736  0.57198 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 3.264e-01  1.438e-02  22.698   <2e-16 ***
## abs(Ydist)  3.168e-05  1.998e-04   0.159    0.874    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2299 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  3.233e-05,  Adjusted R-squared:  -0.001253 
## F-statistic: 0.02515 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 0.874
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = abs(Ydist) ), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissim ~ (abs(Zdist)), data = GuNi2)) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ (abs(Zdist)), data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.33965 -0.20549 -0.04187  0.15856  0.59457 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.339895   0.013899  24.455   <2e-16 ***
## abs(Zdist)  -0.006062   0.005823  -1.041    0.298    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2298 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.001391,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.0001074 
## F-statistic: 1.084 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 0.2982
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = (abs(Zdist)) ), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()

GuNi_TotalDist.mod<- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = GuNi2)
summary(GuNi_TotalDist.mod) # 
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.34743 -0.19784 -0.03756  0.16207  0.58323 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3050835  0.0176077  17.327   <2e-16 ***
## TotalDist   0.0003269  0.0002199   1.487    0.137    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2296 on 778 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.002833,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.001552 
## F-statistic: 2.211 on 1 and 778 DF,  p-value: 0.1375
ggplot(aes(y = Dissim, x = TotalDist ), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  labs(title = "Ten-Mile: Distance between Points")

anova(GuNi_EnvDis.mod, GuNi_TotalDist.mod, test = "Chisq")
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissim ~ EnvDis
## Model 2: Dissim ~ TotalDist
##   Res.Df    RSS Df Sum of Sq Pr(>Chi)
## 1    778 40.129                      
## 2    778 41.013  0  -0.88463
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis+TotalDist, data = GuNi2)) # **
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42090 -0.19015 -0.04231  0.16182  0.61313 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.2022744  0.0293049   6.902 1.06e-11 ***
## EnvDis      0.3323940  0.0762198   4.361 1.47e-05 ***
## TotalDist   0.0002957  0.0002175   1.360    0.174    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.227 on 777 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02666,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02415 
## F-statistic: 10.64 on 2 and 777 DF,  p-value: 2.762e-05
summary(lm(Dissim ~ EnvDis*TotalDist, data = GuNi2)) # .
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ EnvDis * TotalDist, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.4165 -0.1890 -0.0442  0.1635  0.6136 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                    Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)       0.1797282  0.0575140   3.125  0.00184 **
## EnvDis            0.4031847  0.1730627   2.330  0.02008 * 
## TotalDist         0.0006025  0.0007075   0.852  0.39471   
## EnvDis:TotalDist -0.0009572  0.0021007  -0.456  0.64876   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2271 on 776 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02692,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02316 
## F-statistic: 7.155 on 3 and 776 DF,  p-value: 9.623e-05

Marginal Effects

GuNi_Combined.mod <- lm(Dissim ~ TotalDist+EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
summary(GuNi_Combined.mod)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ TotalDist + EnvDis, data = GuNi2)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42090 -0.19015 -0.04231  0.16182  0.61313 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.2022744  0.0293049   6.902 1.06e-11 ***
## TotalDist   0.0002957  0.0002175   1.360    0.174    
## EnvDis      0.3323940  0.0762198   4.361 1.47e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.227 on 777 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02666,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02415 
## F-statistic: 10.64 on 2 and 777 DF,  p-value: 2.762e-05
GuNi.pre<-predictions(GuNi_Combined.mod)
ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = estimate), data = GuNi.pre)+
  geom_point()

GuNi.cmp<- avg_comparisons(GuNi_Combined.mod,  variables =  list(TotalDist = "minmax", EnvDis = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")

GuNi.cmp
## 
##       Term Estimate Std. Error    z Pr(>|z|)    S    5.0 % 95.0 %
##  EnvDis      0.2195     0.0503 4.36   <0.001 16.2  0.13673  0.302
##  TotalDist   0.0476     0.0350 1.36    0.174  2.5 -0.00998  0.105
## 
## Type: response
## Comparison: Max - Min
ggplot(GuNi.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", size = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(title = "Guadalupe-Nipomo")

ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = Dissim), data = GuNi2)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Combined Analysis

Data management

TeMi2$Site<- rep("TeMi", dim(TeMi2)[1])
Zmud2$Site<- rep("Zmud", dim(Zmud2)[1])
GuNi2$Site<- rep("GuNi", dim(GuNi2)[1])

Combo2<-rbind(TeMi2, Zmud2, GuNi2)
Combo2$Site <- factor(Combo2$Site, levels=c('TeMi', 'Zmud', 'GuNi'))

densityplot(~ Dissim, data = Combo2)

densityplot(~ Dissim, group = Site, data = Combo2)

summary(lm(Dissim ~ Site, data = Combo2)) # yeah it is sig, but that is likely just a product of the large sample size rather than a meaningful difference
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissim ~ Site, data = Combo2)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.4328 -0.1654 -0.0233  0.1486  0.6254 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.303926   0.007685  39.549   <2e-16 ***
## SiteZmud    0.150095   0.010369  14.475   <2e-16 ***
## SiteGuNi    0.024307   0.010731   2.265   0.0236 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2092 on 2421 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.09373,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.09298 
## F-statistic: 125.2 on 2 and 2421 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
ggplot(aes(x = Site, y = Dissim, color = Site), data = Combo2)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0)+
  geom_violin(aes(fill = Site), alpha = 0.5)+
  stat_summary_bin(fun = "mean", geom = "point", orientation = 'x', size = 5, color = "black")

ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = Dissim), data = Combo2)+
  geom_point(aes(color = Site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black")+
  geom_smooth(aes(color = Site),method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Negligible effects

Mixed2<- lmer(Dissim ~ EnvDis+TotalDist + (1|Site), data = Combo2)
summary(Mixed2)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist + (1 | Site)
##    Data: Combo2
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -723.5
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.05773 -0.79620 -0.08132  0.70814  3.02229 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Site     (Intercept) 0.006646 0.08152 
##  Residual             0.042786 0.20685 
## Number of obs: 2424, groups:  Site, 3
## 
## Fixed effects:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value
## (Intercept) 0.2640974  0.0490927   5.380
## EnvDis      0.2583934  0.0370819   6.968
## TotalDist   0.0002551  0.0001172   2.176
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##           (Intr) EnvDis
## EnvDis    -0.220       
## TotalDist -0.134 -0.104
car::Anova(Mixed2)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II Wald chisquare tests)
## 
## Response: Dissim
##             Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## EnvDis    48.5556  1  3.211e-12 ***
## TotalDist  4.7361  1    0.02954 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
Mixed2.Inter<- lmer(Dissim ~ EnvDis*TotalDist + (1|Site), data = Combo2)

Mixed2.null<- lmer(Dissim ~ 1 + (1|Site), data = Combo2)
anova(Mixed2, Mixed2.null)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: Combo2
## Models:
## Mixed2.null: Dissim ~ 1 + (1 | Site)
## Mixed2: Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist + (1 | Site)
##             npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Mixed2.null    3 -686.63 -669.25 346.32   -692.63                         
## Mixed2         5 -739.06 -710.09 374.53   -749.06 56.423  2  5.595e-13 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(Mixed2, Mixed2.Inter)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: Combo2
## Models:
## Mixed2: Dissim ~ EnvDis + TotalDist + (1 | Site)
## Mixed2.Inter: Dissim ~ EnvDis * TotalDist + (1 | Site)
##              npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L) Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## Mixed2          5 -739.06 -710.09 374.53   -749.06                    
## Mixed2.Inter    6 -737.09 -702.33 374.54   -749.09 0.033  1     0.8559
Mixed2.cmp<- avg_comparisons(Mixed2, variables = list(EnvDis = "minmax", TotalDist = "minmax"),   conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
as.data.frame(Mixed2.cmp)
##        term  contrast   estimate  std.error statistic      p.value   s.value
## 1    EnvDis Max - Min 0.19010531 0.02728190  6.968184 3.210578e-12 38.180304
## 2 TotalDist Max - Min 0.04104347 0.01885957  2.176267 2.953527e-02  5.081417
##     conf.low  conf.high
## 1 0.14523058 0.23498005
## 2 0.01002224 0.07206471
Bet.Negl<- ggplot(Mixed2.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term,
                 group = contrast)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low,  xmax = conf.high,),position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) + 
  geom_point(size = 4, position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(x = "Estimated Change in Community Dissimilarity", y = "Term")+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18), axis.text.y = element_text( size=12, angle=45))+ 
  scale_y_discrete(labels=c("TotalDist" = "Distance Between Plots", 
                            "EnvDis" = "Environmental Dissimilarity"))

Bet.Negl
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals

ggsave("Between-Marginal.png", dpi = 600, height = 7, width = 10)
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals
plot_predictions(Mixed2, condition = "EnvDis")+
  geom_point(data = Combo2,alpha = 0.5, shape = 1, aes(x = EnvDis, y = Dissim, color = Site))+
  labs(x = "Environmental Dissimilarity", y =  "Community Dissimilarity")+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Guadalupe-Nipomo", "Ten Mile", "Zmudowski"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"))+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18))
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.

library(ggside)
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'ggside':
##   method from   
##   +.gg   ggplot2
pp_between_EnvDis<-plot_predictions(Mixed2, condition = "EnvDis", draw = FALSE)
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
Combo3 <- Combo2 #this is dangerous and bad
Combo3$estimate <- Combo3$Dissim


Bet.EnvDis <- ggplot(aes(x = EnvDis, y = estimate), data = pp_between_EnvDis)+
  geom_point(data = Combo2,alpha = 0.25, aes(x = EnvDis, y = Dissim, shape = Site))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.5, color = "transparent", fill = "grey")+
  geom_line(size = .5)+
  labs(x = "Environmental Dissimilarity", y =  "Community Dissimilarity")+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"), name = "Site")+
  scale_shape_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c(1,2,0), name = "Site")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18),legend.position='bottom', legend.background = element_rect(colour = 'black', fill = 'white', linetype='solid'))+
    geom_xsidedensity(aes(y= after_stat(density),color = Site, fill = Site),
    alpha    = 0.25,
    size     = 1,
    position = "identity",
    data = Combo3
  ) +
    geom_ysidedensity(aes(x= after_stat(density),color = Site, fill = Site),
    alpha    = 0.25,
    size     = 1,
    position = "identity",
    data = Combo3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"), name = "Site")+
  theme_ggside_void()

Bet.EnvDis
## Warning: `is.ggproto()` was deprecated in ggplot2 3.5.2.
## ℹ Please use `is_ggproto()` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

ggsave("Between-EnvDis.png", dpi = 600, height = 7, width = 10)


pp_between_TotalDist<-plot_predictions(Mixed2, condition = "TotalDist", draw = FALSE)
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
Bet.TotalDist<- ggplot(aes(x = TotalDist, y = estimate), data = pp_between_TotalDist)+
  geom_point(data = Combo2,alpha = 0.25, aes(x = TotalDist, y = Dissim, shape = Site))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.5, color = "transparent", fill = "grey")+
  geom_line(size = .5)+
  labs(x = "Distance Between Plots (m)", y =  "Community Dissimilarity")+     
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"), name = "Site")+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"), name = "Site")+
  scale_shape_manual(labels = c("Ten Mile", "Zmudowski", "Guadalupe-Nipomo"), values = c(1,2,0), name = "Site")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18),legend.position='bottom', legend.background = element_rect(colour = 'black', fill = 'white', linetype='solid'))+
    geom_xsidedensity(aes(y= after_stat(density),color = Site, fill = Site),
    alpha    = 0.25,
    size     = 1,
    position = "identity",
    data = Combo3
  ) +
    geom_ysidedensity(aes(x= after_stat(density),color = Site, fill = Site),
    alpha    = 0.25,
    size     = 1,
    position = "identity",
    data = Combo3
  ) +
  theme_ggside_void()


Bet.TotalDist

ggsave("Between-EnvDis.png", dpi = 600, height = 7, width = 10)

Figure Construction

Bet.TotalDist2<- Bet.TotalDist + theme(legend.position='none')
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(Bet.Negl, x = 0, y = .666, width = 1, height = .333) +
  draw_plot(Bet.TotalDist2, x = 0, y = 0.3333, width = 1, height = .333) +
  draw_plot(Bet.EnvDis, x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = 0.3333) +
  draw_plot_label(label = c("A", "B", "C" ),family = "serif", size = 20, color = "black", x = c(0, 0, 0), y = c(.9999, .69, 0.355 ))+
  draw_image("BetweenPlotLogo.png", x = 0.79, y = 0.83, width = .175, height = 0.175) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "transparent"))
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals

ggsave("BetweenGraph.png", dpi = 600, height = 12, width = 9)

Tables

models.plots2<- list( 
  "Reduced Model" = Mixed2,
  "Full Model" = Mixed2.Inter,
  "Null Model" = Mixed2.null
   )

fun <- function(model) data.frame("corrected" = round(cAIC4::cAIC(model)$caic, 2))


modelsummary(models.plots2,
  fmt = 3,
  estimate  = "{estimate} [{conf.low}, {conf.high}]",
  statistic = NULL, 
  conf_level = .90,
  gof_function = fun, 
  gof_omit = 'AIC|BIC|ICC',
  output = "BetweenPlotsTable.docx")
save.image(file="DuneComm4.RData")
